uncaught-error.title: Oops! An error occurred.
uncaught-error.description: We're sorry. Please restart the flow.

session-expired.title: Session expired
session-expired.description: Your session has expired. Please restart it.

config-invalid.title: Integration incorrectly configured
config-invalid.subtitle: It seems like the Verify with Footprint integration is using an invalid integration key. Please contact the owner of this product.

sandbox-outcome.title: Test outcomes
sandbox-outcome.subtitle: Select what result you want this user to have after they complete their onboarding

step-up.title: Step up
step-up.description: Users will upload ID photos if not initially required by the configuration.

simulated-outcome.title: Simulated outcome
simulated-outcome.description: Mocked outcome independent of the uploaded image

fail.title: Fail
fail.description: General outcome will fail if ID-doc image fails.

real-outcome.title: Real outcome
real-outcome.description: We'll run uploaded images through the same processor used in production and outcomes will reflect the real response.

test-id.label: Test ID
test-id.description: You can log into a previously created sandbox user by using the Test ID from that corresponding session.
test-id.hint: Do not use special characters or spaces.

errors.invalid: Test ID is invalid. Please remove spaces and special characters.

complete.title: Submission completed!
complete.subtitle-with-kyb: Thanks for using Footprint to verify your business and your identity.
complete.subtitle: Thanks for using Footprint to verify your identity.
